request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? Just last month, a critical component shortage left our defense systems vulnerable. We can't afford to wait for another crisis. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy and secure our future. #NationalSecurityFirst
